summary: R.6.1 Dashboard Visual + Counting Fix - Complete Testing. 9/9 backend tests PASSED, all frontend UI tests PASSED. New counting fields (total_properties, sold_count, not_sold_count, available_count, reserved_count, compensation_count, etc.) working correctly. Visual upgrades (text-5xl values, rounded-2xl cards, gradient backgrounds, h-80 charts) verified. Sales role correctly restricted from finance cards.

issues: 2FA notification toast overlaps with filters in top-right corner - minor visual overlap, filters still functional (carried over from R.6)

critical_code_review_comments: dashboard_aggregations.py: Correctly implements all 13 new counting fields + 5 new finance fields. count_reconciliation_ok flag properly calculates if all status buckets sum to total.

DashboardTabs.jsx: StatCard component upgraded with 'big' prop for text-5xl values. StatusCell helper for 6 colored inventory breakdown cells. Gradient backgrounds (from-emerald-50, from-amber-50, from-slate-900) and shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transitions.
AdminDashboard.jsx: Tab triggers with text-sm px-4 py-2 styling. Proper filter state management.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Used existing: 52 total properties, 18 apartments (5 sold, 6 available, 7 compensation)
context_for_next_testing_agent: R.6.1 fully tested. Key test points: (1) HERO row with 3 big cards (Общо имоти dark, Продадени green, Непродадени amber) with text-5xl values, (2) Inventory breakdown section with 6 status cells (available emerald, reserved-zero amber, reserved-deposit orange, sold slate, compensation violet, hidden stone), (3) 'сметката е балансирана' hint when count_reconciliation_ok=true, (4) Finance cards (sellable-potential blue, paid green, overdue red/green) only for finance roles, (5) Apartment filter: total=18, sold=5, not_sold=13, available=6, compensation=7, (6) Sales role: finance cards hidden, € amounts hidden in status cells and HERO cards, (7) All 6 tabs working with visual upgrades (h-80 charts, text-base tables, rounded-2xl cards)

verified_features.feature: Backend: GET /api/dashboard/admin/full?property_type=apartment returns overview with 13 new counting fields
Backend: total_properties=18, sold_count=5, not_sold_count=13 for apartments
Backend: available_count=6, compensation_count=7, count_reconciliation_ok=true
Backend: sellable_potential_with_vat, reserved_value_with_vat, compensation_value_visual_only_with_vat present for admin
Backend: Finance fields hidden for sales role (is_finance_visible=false)
Backend: Legacy keys (cash, sales, calendar, top_clients, recent_sales, recent_inquiries, alerts) present
Frontend: HERO row with 3 big cards [overview-card-total, overview-card-sold, overview-card-not-sold]
Frontend: Total card has dark accent (from-slate-900), Sold green (from-emerald-50), Not sold amber (from-amber-50)
Frontend: Values are text-5xl (big prop) for HERO cards
Frontend: Inventory breakdown section [overview-inventory-breakdown] with 6 status cells

Frontend: Status cells: status-cell-available (emerald), status-cell-reserved-zero (amber), status-cell-reserved-deposit (orange), status-cell-sold (slate), status-cell-compensation (violet), status-cell-hidden (stone)
Frontend: Hint text 'сметката е балансирана' when count_reconciliation_ok=true
Frontend: Finance cards [overview-card-sellable-potential, overview-card-paid, overview-card-overdue] for finance roles
Frontend: Apartment filter updates all status cells with correct numbers
Frontend: Sales role - finance cards NOT rendered
Frontend: Sales role - status cells visible but € amounts hidden
Frontend: Visual upgrade - cards have rounded-2xl, shadow-sm hover:shadow-md, gradient backgrounds
Frontend: Visual upgrade - charts have h-80 height
Frontend: Visual upgrade - tables have text-base fonts
Frontend: Tab triggers have text-sm px-4 py-2 styling
Regression: All 6 tabs (Обзор, Продажби, Финанси, Календар, Клиенти, Непродадени) working
Regression: Pipeline funnel, Action items, Recent sales, Recent inquiries working
